name: provision-publish
description: Publish a reusable skill to your team's Skills library
author: Provision AI

tools.name: skill_publish
tools.description: Publish a SKILL.md you have authored to the team's Skills library so it shows up in the dashboard and can be deployed to other agents. Use after you've written and tested a reusable workflow.

name.description: Human-readable skill name (e.g. 'LinkedIn Lead Gen'). The slug is derived from this; re-publishing the same name updates the existing skill and bumps its version.

skill_content.description: The full SKILL.md content (YAML frontmatter + instructions). Either this or content_file is required.

content_file.description: Path to a file containing the SKILL.md content, as an alternative to passing skill_content inline.

description.description: One-line description of what the skill does

tools.description: Tools the skill needs (e.g. browser, exec, email)
